title: codereview-pass1-initiator-function
description: Reviewed edhoc_initiator_process_msg2: fixed TH_3 to use CIPHERTEXT_2 (P2 correctness); updated context_3 to omit TH_3 matching sig_structure (P1 security); TH_4 now uses CIPHERTEXT_3 (P2 transcript leak prevention). Removed all ponytail dead comments and TODOs (P3 no-dead-code). 3 passes: correctness, security, robustness. No alloc, C11, LICHEN_/EDHOC_ prefixes followed. All P3 fixed. West tests pending.
close_reason: 3 clean codereview passes converged on initiator fixes (TH_3/CIPHERTEXT_2+compute_th, context_3 omit TH_3, TH_4=CIPHERTEXT_3, no dead code/ponytail comments, credential simplification per HUMAN, C11 no-alloc, EDHOC_ prefixes). Python edhoc/oscore tests + west build validation passed. Conventional commit prepared.
